week: Jul 6–24 · San Diego · full gym · build the engine before Spain
principles: Goal: build a deep, springy base — stiff elastic tendons, strong deep-range legs, fast feet. This is the foundation the whole season stands on.
North-star targets this block: a full floor-to-floor Nordic curl · front & middle splits · fast-twitch legs AND arms. Every session chips at one of these.
Elastic strength = strong through the FULL range: eccentric hamstrings (Nordics), loaded end-range mobility (the splits protocol), and reactive plyos. Chase range with control, not just load.
Two engines every week: STRENGTH (squat, hinge, press — RPE 7–8, leave 1–2 reps) and SPRINGS (sprints, pogos, bounds, depth jumps — max quality, full recovery).

Tendons love two things: heavy-slow strength and long isometrics. Spanish squats, calf work and tibialis raises show up all week — they build the 'tight fast' tendons that let you lunge deep and recover instantly. Collagen + vitamin C 30–60 min before this work (see Eat tab).
Plyometrics are a skill, not conditioning. Never grind them tired — short sets, long rest, silent-fast ground contact. Quality over quantity, every rep.
Own the deep range: ATG split squats, cossacks and deep lunges make the bottom of your lunge strong and safe, so the recovery is free.
Progression: Week 1 groove technique at RPE 7 · Week 2 add load & contacts · Week 3 peak intent — then Spain (Jul 25) is a built-in deload: walk lots, mobilize, come back hungry.
Full gym now — barbells are the base. Feed it: this volume runs on protein, carbs around sessions, and sleep.

days.warmup: RAMP 8–10 min: bike/row 3 min easy → leg swings, deep squat holds, ankle rocks → 2×6 pogo hops (stiff, quiet) → 3×3 squat jumps at max intent to prime the CNS

exercises.name: Back squat
cues: Big brace, bar on the upper back
Sit between the hips, knees track toes
Full depth you control, then drive up hard

exercises.name: ATG split squat
cues: Front knee travels far past the toes
Own the deepest range — this is your lunge insurance
exercises.video: ATG split squat knees over toes
exercises.notes: Bodyweight or light DBs. Grow the depth week to week.

exercises.name: DB Romanian deadlift
cues: Hinge at the hips, soft knees
Feel the hamstrings stretch, then snap the hips

exercises.name: Spanish squat isometric
exercises.target: heavy band behind the knees · rest 90s
cues: Push the knees into the band
Quads on fire — this builds tendon stiffness
exercises.notes: No band? Wall sit at a hard angle. The burn is the point.

exercises.name: Tibialis raise
cues: Heels down, pull the toes toward the shins
Bulletproofs the shin and ankle for lunges

days.power: Primer before squats: 3×3 squat jumps — max intent, full reset between reps
days.conditioning: Optional Z2: 15 min easy bike or row, nose-breathing pace
days.mobility: Couch stretch 2×45s/side + ankle rocks 2 min while you cool down

days.focus: Push/pull base + épée arm care · ~55 min
days.warmup: Shoulder prep: bike 3 min → band pull-aparts 2×15, wall slides, scap push-ups 2×8 → light external rotations

exercises.name: Bench press
cues: Drive the feet, press with intent

exercises.name: Pull-ups
cues: Pull the chest to the bar

exercises.name: Overhead press
cues: Press straight, head through at the top

exercises.name: Cable face pull
exercises.notes: Shoulder health + posture — the unglamorous rep that keeps you fencing.

exercises.name: DB wrist/forearm prehab
cues: The épée wrist pays rent here

days.power: Fast-arms primer before bench: 3×3 plyo push-ups OR med-ball chest pass — max speed off the floor/wall, full reset. Explosive, not tired.
days.conditioning: Optional: 10 min easy row or incline walk

days.focus: Max velocity + reactive springs · ~60 min, all quality
days.warmup: Thorough: bike 3 min → dynamic leg swings, A-skips 2×15m, high knees, ankle pops → build-up runs 3×20m (60/70/80%). Do NOT start sprints until fully warm.

exercises.name: Sprint accelerations
cues: Push the ground away behind you
Every rep max effort or it doesn't count
exercises.notes: Speed is trained fresh. If quality drops, stop — this is the whole point of the day.

exercises.name: Pogo hops
cues: Straight legs, spring from the ankle
Touch and go — the floor is lava

exercises.name: Bounds
cues: Drive the knee, hang in the air

exercises.name: Depth jump
cues: Hit the ground and explode up instantly
exercises.notes: Low box first. This is the purest elasticity drill — protect the quality.

exercises.name: Split squat jump
cues: Deep lunge, switch legs in the air

exercises.name: Copenhagen plank
cues: Bulletproofs the adductor for deep lunges

days.conditioning: None — today IS the nervous-system day. Keep it fast and fresh.

days.focus: Hinge strength + the fencing engine · ~60 min
days.warmup: RAMP: bike/row 3 min → hip hinges, leg swings, glute bridges 2×10 → 2×5 broad jumps at moderate effort

exercises.name: Trap-bar deadlift
cues: Chest up, push the floor away

exercises.name: Nordic hamstring curl
exercises.target: slowest eccentric you can · rest 2 min
cues: Hips locked, body straight from knee to head
Resist every inch down to the floor
Catch, then pull yourself back up
exercises.video: nordic hamstring curl full range progression
exercises.notes: TARGET = a full floor-to-floor Nordic (down slow AND back up unassisted). Ladder: 1) band/hands-assisted slow lower → 2) unassisted slow lower to the floor → 3) small push-off rebound up → 4) full range down & up. Add ROM/reps each week; 5 controlled eccentrics beat 10 sloppy. Slider or razor curls on off-days speed this up.

exercises.name: DB step-up
cues: No push-off from the back foot

exercises.name: DB reverse lunge
cues: Step back, drop the back knee to the floor
Push through the front heel to stand

exercises.name: Standing calf raise
cues: Deep, slow stretch at the bottom
exercises.notes: Loaded calves = a stiffer, more elastic Achilles. Don't rush them.

days.power: Primer before deadlifts: 2×5 broad jumps — stick every landing
days.conditioning: Fencing engine: 8 × (20s hard bike/assault bike / 90s easy). All-out on the 20s — this IS the épée gas tank.

days.warmup: Bike 3 min → dynamic mobility → 2×6 pogo hops, 3×3 squat jumps

exercises.name: Med-ball rotational throw
cues: Load the back hip, whip through
Throw it like you're scoring a touch

exercises.name: Hip thrust
exercises.target: RPE 7 · 1s pause at top · rest 2 min
cues: Drive the hips to full lockout
Squeeze the glutes hard at the top

exercises.name: Cossack squat
cues: Sink to one side, heel down
Own the deep end — hip & ankle under load

exercises.name: Fencing footwork — explosive
cues: Low and loaded, light on the feet

exercises.name: Dead bug
cues: Low back flat on the floor

days.conditioning: Optional: 5×20s strides on grass, relaxed and fast

days.focus: Active recovery + splits protocol — this is training too · ~40 min
days.warmup: Get WARM first — 10 min easy bike/walk + a few deep squat holds. Flexibility gains only happen in warm tissue; never stretch hard cold.

exercises.name: Ankle & hip mobility flow
cues: Move slow, breathe into the range
exercises.video: ankle hip mobility routine for athletes

exercises.name: Front splits progression
cues: Square the hips, back knee down
Sink only as far as you can breathe calmly
exercises.notes: Blocks/books under the hands to support. Chase a little more depth each week — cm by cm.

exercises.name: Middle splits / pancake
cues: Feet wide, hinge from the hips
Neutral spine, chest toward the floor

exercises.name: Jefferson curl
cues: Roll down one vertebra at a time
Roll back up slowly — strong end-range hamstrings
exercises.notes: Start 2.5–5kg. Loaded flexibility, NOT a max lift — this directly feeds the splits and full Nordic.

exercises.name: Couch stretch (loaded)
cues: Back foot up the wall, knee down
Breathe into the front of the hip

days.conditioning: Zone 2: 20–30 min easy bike, row, or brisk walk. Nose-breathing, conversational — this aerobic base is what refills your tank between bouts.
days.mobility: Finish with a long adductor + hamstring hold while you're warm
days.notes: Recovery is training. Run the splits protocol 3–4×/week — always warm, never forced. PNF: 20–30s stretch, 5s gentle contract, relax deeper. Consistency beats intensity: daily gentle range wins. Hit 8k+ steps, protein, and sleep.

note: 3-week general-prep base block: heavy-slow strength + reactive springs + tendon isometrics + a splits protocol — built for deep lunges, instant recovery, and elastic strength (a full floor-to-floor Nordic, front & middle splits, fast limbs). Weights start at smart estimates — spin the wheels to match your bar. Fuel it from the Eat tab (carbs periodized, collagen before tendon work). Spain (Jul 25+) = deload: walk, mobilize, keep the splits ticking. Then the periodized ramp toward the Aug 15 force-velocity test and the Oct NAC.
